prompt: Can you start indexing the codebase so we can query functions and modules?

assertions.text: Claude calls vulcan_ingest_status before attempting to start ingestion
Claude calls vulcan_ingest_git only if status shows ingestion is not already running
Claude uses vulcan_ingest_git to start background indexing rather than manually storing code entities via vulcan_transact
Claude informs the user that ingestion runs in the background
Claude does not block or claim to wait — it starts the job and moves on
